title: Using unencrypted Amazon EFS file systems is sensitive
description: Checks if the AWS boto3 client or resource is used with an unencrypted Amazon EFS file system.
message: Using unencrypted Amazon EFS file systems is sensitive.

noncompliant.code:
import boto3
efs = boto3.resource('efs')
fs = efs.create_filesystem(...)
fs.create_mount_target(...)
noncompliant.description: Creates an unencrypted EFS file system.

compliant.code:
import boto3
encrypted_efs = boto3.client('efs', region_name='us-west-2', aws_access_key_id='YOUR_ACCESS_KEY', aws_secret_access_key='YOUR_SECRET_KEY')
encrypted_fs = encrypted_efs.create_filesystem(...)
encrypted_fs.create_mount_target(..., encryption_by_default={True})
compliant.description: Creates an EFS file system with encryption enabled.

why_is_this_an_issue: Unencrypted Amazon EFS file systems can be vulnerable to data breaches and unauthorized access.

logic.new_check_type_doc: Checks if the AWS boto3 client or resource is used with an unencrypted Amazon EFS file system.

metadata.title: Using unencrypted Amazon EFS file systems is sensitive
